disclaimers.general: UAE Stocks Intelligence is an information and research-support tool. It is NOT investment advice, a recommendation, or a solicitation. Data may be delayed and is shown for demonstration unless a licensed feed is connected.
disclaimers.ai: AI Analysis is app-generated research support produced by an explainable model. House scores are computed by a deterministic engine, not by the AI. This is not personalised financial advice. Under the UAE SCA framework, only registered parties may give financial recommendations.
disclaimers.arabic: Where a document's source language is Arabic, the Arabic text is the official version; English is an app-generated translation provided for convenience.
disclaimers.data: Official exchange and issuer sources rank first; media second; opinion last. Every item carries its source and timestamp. Real-time/redistributed market data requires a licensed agreement with the exchange or an authorised vendor.
